// Generated by BoltFFI. Do not edit.
package {{ package_name }}

{% if uses_flow %}import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.flow

{% endif %}
{% if uses_async_callback_bridges %}import kotlinx.coroutines.launch

{% endif %}

{% for function in functions -%}
import {{ native_binding_package }}.{{ function.ffi_symbol }} as __native_{{ function.ffi_symbol }}
{% endfor %}
{% for callback_import in callback_imports -%}
{{ callback_import }}
{% endfor %}
{% for class_import in class_imports -%}
{{ class_import }}
{% endfor %}

{% if uses_flow || uses_wire_reader %}
private fun boltffiReadLeI16(bytes: ByteArray, offset: Int): Short {
    val b0 = bytes[offset].toInt() and 0xFF
    val b1 = bytes[offset + 1].toInt() and 0xFF
    return ((b1 shl 8) or b0).toShort()
}

private fun boltffiReadLeI32(bytes: ByteArray, offset: Int): Int {
    val b0 = bytes[offset].toInt() and 0xFF
    val b1 = bytes[offset + 1].toInt() and 0xFF
    val b2 = bytes[offset + 2].toInt() and 0xFF
    val b3 = bytes[offset + 3].toInt() and 0xFF
    return (b3 shl 24) or (b2 shl 16) or (b1 shl 8) or b0
}

private fun boltffiReadLeI64(bytes: ByteArray, offset: Int): Long {
    var value = 0L
    var shift = 0
    var index = 0
    while (index < 8) {
        val part = bytes[offset + index].toLong() and 0xFFL
        value = value or (part shl shift)
        shift += 8
        index += 1
    }
    return value
}

private fun boltffiDecodeI16List(bytes: ByteArray): List<Short> =
    List(bytes.size / 2) { index -> boltffiReadLeI16(bytes, index * 2) }

private fun boltffiDecodeU16List(bytes: ByteArray): List<UShort> =
    List(bytes.size / 2) { index -> boltffiReadLeI16(bytes, index * 2).toUShort() }

private fun boltffiDecodeI32List(bytes: ByteArray): List<Int> =
    List(bytes.size / 4) { index -> boltffiReadLeI32(bytes, index * 4) }

private fun boltffiDecodeU32List(bytes: ByteArray): List<UInt> =
    List(bytes.size / 4) { index -> boltffiReadLeI32(bytes, index * 4).toUInt() }

private fun boltffiDecodeI64List(bytes: ByteArray): List<Long> =
    List(bytes.size / 8) { index -> boltffiReadLeI64(bytes, index * 8) }

private fun boltffiDecodeU64List(bytes: ByteArray): List<ULong> =
    List(bytes.size / 8) { index -> boltffiReadLeI64(bytes, index * 8).toULong() }

private fun boltffiDecodeF32List(bytes: ByteArray): List<Float> =
    List(bytes.size / 4) { index -> Float.fromBits(boltffiReadLeI32(bytes, index * 4)) }

private fun boltffiDecodeF64List(bytes: ByteArray): List<Double> =
    List(bytes.size / 8) { index -> Double.fromBits(boltffiReadLeI64(bytes, index * 8)) }

{% endif %}
{% if uses_wire_reader %}
private class boltffiWireReader(private val bytes: ByteArray) {
    private var pos: Int = 0

    fun readBool(): Boolean = readU8().toInt() != 0

    fun readI8(): Byte {
        val value = bytes[pos]
        pos += 1
        return value
    }

    fun readU8(): UByte {
        val value = bytes[pos].toUByte()
        pos += 1
        return value
    }

    fun readI16(): Short {
        val value = boltffiReadLeI16(bytes, pos)
        pos += 2
        return value
    }

    fun readU16(): UShort = readI16().toUShort()

    fun readI32(): Int {
        val value = boltffiReadLeI32(bytes, pos)
        pos += 4
        return value
    }

    fun readU32(): UInt = readI32().toUInt()

    fun readI64(): Long {
        val value = boltffiReadLeI64(bytes, pos)
        pos += 8
        return value
    }

    fun readU64(): ULong = readI64().toULong()

    fun readF32(): Float = Float.fromBits(readI32())

    fun readF64(): Double = Double.fromBits(readI64())

    fun readBytes(): ByteArray {
        val len = readI32()
        if (len <= 0) {
            return byteArrayOf()
        }
        val start = pos
        val end = pos + len
        pos = end
        return bytes.copyOfRange(start, end)
    }

    fun readString(): String = readBytes().decodeToString()
}

{% endif %}

{{ class_source }}

{% endfor %}

{{ callback_bridge_source }}

{% endfor %}

actual object {{ module_name }} {
{% for function in functions -%}
{% match function.return_type -%}
{% when Some with (return_type) -%}
    actual {% if function.is_async %}suspend {% endif %}fun {{ function.public_name }}({% for param in function.params %}{{ param.name }}: {{ param.kotlin_type }}{% if !loop.last %}, {% endif %}{% endfor %}): {{ return_type }} = __native_{{ function.ffi_symbol }}({% for param in function.params %}{{ param.name }}{% if !loop.last %}, {% endif %}{% endfor %})
{% when None -%}
    actual {% if function.is_async %}suspend {% endif %}fun {{ function.public_name }}({% for param in function.params %}{{ param.name }}: {{ param.kotlin_type }}{% if !loop.last %}, {% endif %}{% endfor %}): Unit {
        __native_{{ function.ffi_symbol }}({% for param in function.params %}{{ param.name }}{% if !loop.last %}, {% endif %}{% endfor %})
    }
{% endmatch %}
{% endfor %}
}
